File: agent\core.py (1914 lines total)
   1 | """
   2 | agent/core.py
   3 | 
   4 | ReAct 主循环。整个 agent 的大脑。
   5 | 
   6 | 职责（只做这些，不做别的）：
   7 | - 维护对话历史，每轮组装 messages 调用 LLM
   8 | - 拿到 Action 后调用 ToolRegistry 执行
   9 | - 把 Action + Observation 写入 EventLog
  10 | - 检测三种终止/Reflection 触发条件
  11 | - 返回 RunResult
  12 | 
  13 | 不负责：
  14 | - 任何 LLM 细节（交给 LLMBackend）
  15 | - 任何工具实现（交给 Tool）
  16 | - 上下文压缩（由 context/ 模块负责）
  17 | """
  18 | 
  19 | from __future__ import annotations
  20 | 
  21 | import json
  22 | import logging
  23 | import re
  24 | from dataclasses import dataclass, field
  25 | from pathlib import Path
  26 | from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Literal
  27 | 
  28 | from agent.completion import CompletionValidator
  29 | from agent.policy import TaskPolicy, build_task_policy
  30 | from agent.policy_registry import PolicyAwareToolRegistry as _PolicyAwareRegistry
  31 | from agent.policy_registry import PolicyAwareToolRegistry
  32 | from agent.event_log import EventLog
  33 | from context.evidence import EvidenceLedger
  34 | from context.history import ConversationHistory
  35 | from context.repo_map import RepoMap
  36 | from context.token_budget import TokenBudget
  37 | from agent.prompt import (
  38 |     build_system_prompt,
  39 |     build_system_prompt_core,
  40 |     build_system_prompt_variable,
  41 |     build_task_prompt,
  42 |     reflection_no_edit,
  43 |     reflection_test_failed,
  44 | )
  45 | from agent.task import (
  46 |     Action, ActionType, Event, EventType,
  47 |     Observation, ObservationStatus, RunResult, RunStatus, Task, ToolCall,
  48 | )
  49 | from context.artifacts import ArtifactStore
  50 | from context.compaction import ConversationCompactor
  51 | from context.manager import ContextManager, ContextManagerConfig, RequestContext
  52 | from llm.base import LLMBackend, LLMMessage, LLMToolSchema
  53 | from tools.base import ToolRegistry
  54 | 
  55 | if TYPE_CHECKING:
  56 |     from memory.context import MemoryContext
  57 | 
  58 | logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
  59 | 
  60 | AnalysisPhase = Literal["discover", "inspect", "synthesize", "verify", "answer"]
  61 | 
  62 | _BROAD_ANALYSIS_RE = re.compile(
  63 |     r"(梳理|架构|审计|路线图|优先级|主要问题|优化|review architecture|roadmap|audit)",
  64 |     re.IGNORECASE,
  65 | )
  66 | _DISCOVERY_TOOL_NAMES = frozenset({"find_files", "search_text", "find_symbol"})
  67 | _READ_TOOL_NAMES = frozenset({"file_read", "file_view"})
  68 | 
  69 | 
  70 | @dataclass
  71 | class AnalysisPhaseState:
  72 |     """Runtime state for broad read-only phased analysis."""
  73 |     enabled: bool = False
  74 |     phase: AnalysisPhase = "discover"
  75 |     files_read: set[str] = field(default_factory=set)
  76 |     discovery_tools_used: int = 0
  77 |     inspect_reads: int = 0
  78 |     verify_reads: int = 0
  79 |     synthesize_requested: bool = False
  80 |     phase_summaries: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  81 | 
  82 | 
  83 | # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  84 | # 配置
  85 | # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  86 | 
  87 | @dataclass
  88 | class AgentConfig:
  89 |     """Agent 运行时配置，从 config/default.yaml 加载后传入。"""
  90 |     max_steps: int = 40
  91 |     reflection_no_edit_steps: int = 6   # 连续 N 步无文件写操作触发 Reflection
  92 |     loop_detection_window: int = 3       # 连续 N 步完全相同 action 判定死循环
  93 |     test_tool_names: tuple[str, ...] = ("test", "pytest")  # 触发 Reflection 的工具名
  94 |     budget_tokens: int = 80_000            # task spend 上限（billable tokens）
  95 |     request_budget_tokens: int = 70_000    # 单次 request 输入上下文预算
  96 |     artifact_threshold_tokens: int = 2_000 # 工具输出超过此值时 artifact 化
  97 |     artifact_storage_dir: str = ".forge-agent/artifacts"  # repo-relative durable artifact storage
  98 |     analysis_inspect_read_limit: int = 5    # broad analysis inspect 阶段最多 distinct file reads
  99 |     analysis_verify_read_limit: int = 2     # broad analysis verify 阶段最多额外 file reads
 100 |     missing_test_target_max_followups: int = 2  # pytest 路径缺失后最多允许的确认性探索步数
 101 |     history_max_messages: int = 40         # 历史最大条数
 102 |     llm_max_retries: int = 3               # LLM 调用失败最大重试次数
 103 |     llm_retry_delay: float = 2.0           # 重试间隔（秒，指数退避）
 104 |     stream: bool = False                   # 是否启用流式输出
 105 |     stream_callback: object = None         # StreamCallback，最终回答流式回调
 106 |     thought_callback: object = None        # StreamCallback，推理过程流式回调（推理模型专用）
 107 |     confirm_dangerous: bool = False        # 是否对危险命令要求用户确认
 108 |     confirm_callback: object = None        # ConfirmCallback，None=跳过确认
 109 |     compact_history: bool = True           # 是否启用积极的历史压缩（sub-agent 应关闭）
 110 | 
 111 | 
 112 | 
 113 | # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 114 | # 共享工具函数
 115 | # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 116 | 
 117 | def _git_diff(repo_path: str) -> str | None:
 118 |     """抓取 git diff HEAD 作为 patch，失败时静默返回 None。"""
 119 |     import subprocess
 120 |     try:
 121 |         proc = subprocess.run(
 122 |             ["git", "diff", "HEAD"],
 123 |             capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10, cwd=repo_path,
 124 |             encoding="utf-8", errors="replace",
 125 |         )
 126 |         diff = proc.stdout.strip()
 127 |         return diff if diff else None
 128 |     except Exception:
 129 |         return None
 130 | 
 131 | 
 132 | # 只读工具白名单（Plan Mode 下可用）
 133 | _READONLY_TOOLS = frozenset({
 134 |     "file_read", "file_view", "find_files", "find_symbol",
 135 |     "search_text", "git_status", "git_diff",
 136 |     "web_search", "web_fetch",
 137 |     "artifact_list", "artifact_read",
 138 |     "memory_read", "memory_list",
 139 | })
 140 | 
 141 | # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 142 | # ReActAgent — ReAct (Reasoning + Acting) 主循环
 143 | # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 144 | 
 145 | class ReActAgent:
 146 |     """
 147 |     ReAct 主循环实现。
 148 | 
 149 |     用法：
 150 |         agent = ReActAgent(backend, registry, config)
 151 |         result = agent.run(task, log)
 152 | 
 153 |     这是一个纯粹的 ReAct agent：每步 思考→行动→观察，循环直到完成或超限。
 154 |     对于需要"先规划后执行"的多步骤复杂任务，使用 PlanExecuteAgent 作为编排层。
 155 |     """
 156 | 
 157 |     def __init__(
 158 |         self,
 159 |         backend: LLMBackend,
 160 |         registry: ToolRegistry,
 161 |         config: AgentConfig | None = None,
 162 |         memory_context: "MemoryContext | None" = None,
 163 |     ) -> None:
 164 |         self._backend = backend
 165 |         self._full_registry = registry  # 保存完整注册表
 166 |         self._registry = registry
 167 |         self._readonly_registry = self._build_readonly_registry()
 168 |         self._cfg = config or AgentConfig()
 169 |         self._memory_context = memory_context
 170 |         self._artifact_store = ArtifactStore(
 171 |             threshold_tokens=self._cfg.artifact_threshold_tokens,
 172 |         )
 173 |         artifact_store_ref = getattr(registry, "_artifact_store_ref", None)
 174 |         if artifact_store_ref is not None:
 175 |             artifact_store_ref.store = self._artifact_store
 176 |         self._context_manager = ContextManager(ContextManagerConfig(
 177 |             request_budget_tokens=self._cfg.request_budget_tokens,
 178 |             history_max_messages=self._cfg.history_max_messages,
 179 |             compact_history=self._cfg.compact_history,
 180 |             enable_caching=False,  # updated per-request in _build_messages
 181 |         ))
 182 |         self._session_context: str | None = None  # set by ChatSession per round
 183 | 
 184 |     @property
 185 |     def step_count(self) -> int:
 186 |         """返回当前执行的步数（第几步）。"""
 187 |         return getattr(self, "_current_step", 0)
 188 | 
 189 |     @property
 190 |     def artifact_store(self) -> ArtifactStore:
 191 |         return self._artifact_store
 192 | 
 193 |     # ------------------------------------------------------------------
 194 |     # 公开接口
 195 |     # ------------------------------------------------------------------
 196 | 
 197 |     def run(self, task: Task, log: EventLog) -> RunResult:
 198 |         """
 199 |         执行一次完整的 agent 运行。
 200 | 
 201 |         Args:
 202 |             task: 任务描述
 203 |             log:  已初始化的 EventLog（由调用方创建并传入）
 204 | 
 205 |         Returns:
 206 |             RunResult，包含最终状态和统计信息
 207 |         """
 208 |         self._current_repo_path = task.repo_path
 209 |         self._artifact_store.set_storage_dir(Path(task.repo_path) / self._cfg.artifact_storage_dir)
 210 |         self._current_task_description = task.description
 211 |         self._task_intent = getattr(task, "intent", "edit")
 212 | 
 213 |         # ── Policy enforcement (shared with PlanExecuteAgent) ─────────
 214 |         policy = build_task_policy(task)
 215 |         if isinstance(self._full_registry, _PolicyAwareRegistry):
 216 |             # PlanExecuteAgent already wrapped; skip double-wrapping
 217 |             return self._run_body(task, log, policy=policy)
 218 |         original_registry = self._registry
 219 |         self._registry = _PolicyAwareRegistry(
 220 |             base=self._full_registry,
 221 |             phase_policy=policy.execution,
 222 |             repo_path=task.repo_path,
 223 |             phase_name="execution",
 224 |         )
 225 |         try:
 226 |             return self._run_body(task, log, policy=policy)
 227 |         finally:
 228 |             self._registry = original_registry
 229 | 
 230 |     def _run_body(self, task: Task, log: EventLog, *, policy: TaskPolicy) -> RunResult:
 231 |         """核心循环：所有 return 路径都走这里，由 run() 负责策略包裹和恢复。"""
 232 |         self._active_policy = policy
 233 |         # 按 repo_path 隔离 repo_map 缓存，换 repo 时自动重建
 234 |         cache_key = task.repo_path
 235 |         if getattr(self, "_repo_map_cache_key", None) != cache_key:
 236 |             if hasattr(self, "_repo_map_cache"):
 237 |                 del self._repo_map_cache
 238 |             self._repo_map_cache_key = cache_key
 239 | 
 240 |         # 设置任务上下文，用于记忆相关性过滤
 241 |         if self._memory_context:
 242 |             self._memory_context.set_task_context(task.description)
 243 | 
 244 |         # ── Long-term memory: build once, cached for the run ─────
 245 |         if hasattr(self, "_long_term_context"):
 246 |             del self._long_term_context
 247 |         self._build_long_term_context()
 248 | 
 249 |         self._loop_break_injected = False
 250 |         self._accessed_files: set[str] = set()
 251 |         self._procedural_injected_files: set[str] = set()
 252 |         self._read_file_ranges: set[tuple[str, int, int | None]] = set()
 253 |         self._analysis_read_guardrail_injected = False
 254 |         self._evidence_ledger = EvidenceLedger()
 255 |         self._analysis_phase_state = self._init_analysis_phase_state(task, policy)
 256 |         log.log_task_start(task)
 257 |         logger.info("Agent starting task %s", task.task_id)
 258 | 
 259 |         # 初始化上下文管理器
 260 |         # 如果调用方（ChatSession）注入了共享 history，直接复用；
 261 |         # 否则新建（单次 run 模式）
 262 |         if hasattr(self, "_pending_history") and self._pending_history is not None:
 263 |             history = self._pending_history
 264 |         else:
 265 |             history = ConversationHistory(max_messages=self._cfg.history_max_messages)
 266 |             # 单次模式：把任务描述作为第一条 user 消息
 267 |             from agent.prompt import build_task_prompt
 268 |             history.add(LLMMessage(
 269 |                 role="user",
 270 |                 content=build_task_prompt(
 271 |                     task.description, task.repo_path, task.issue_url,
 272 |                     intent=self._task_intent,
 273 |                 ),
 274 |             ))
 275 |         token_budget = TokenBudget(total=self._cfg.request_budget_tokens)
 276 |         repo_map = RepoMap(task.repo_path)
 277 | 
 278 |         total_tokens = 0
 279 |         steps_without_edit = 0
 280 |         consecutive_failures = 0
 281 |         _max_consecutive_failures = 3
 282 |         reflection_counts: dict[str, int] = {}  # reason -> count
 283 |         missing_test_target_followups: int | None = None
 284 |         missing_test_target_message: str | None = None
 285 |         missing_test_target_detected_step: int | None = None
 286 |         # 累计 prompt caching 统计
 287 |         from llm.base import CacheStats
 288 |         cumulative_cache = CacheStats()
 289 | 
 290 |         for step in range(1, task.max_steps + 1):
 291 |             self._current_step = step  # 用于 compaction 日志
 292 |             self.compactor.tick_step()
 293 |             logger.debug("Step %d/%d", step, task.max_steps)
 294 | 
 295 |             # ── 1. 组装 messages，调用 LLM ──────────────────────────────
 296 |             # 设置最新用户消息，供 RAG 主动检索使用
 297 |             if self._memory_context:
 298 |                 last_user_msg = history.get_last_user_message()
 299 |                 if last_user_msg:
 300 |                     self._memory_context.set_user_message(last_user_msg)
 301 | 
 302 |             messages = self._build_messages(
 303 |                 history, token_budget, repo_map,
 304 |                 consumed_tokens=total_tokens,
 305 |                 max_context_window=self._backend.max_context_window,
 306 |             )
 307 |             tools = self._registry.get_schemas()
 308 | 
 309 |             try:
 310 |                 response = self._call_with_retry(messages, tools)
 311 |             except Exception as exc:
 312 |                 logger.error("LLM call failed at step %d after retries: %s", step, exc)
 313 |                 log.log_task_failed(steps=step, reason=f"LLM error: {exc}")
 314 |                 return RunResult(
 315 |                     task_id=task.task_id,
 316 |                     status=RunStatus.FAILED,
 317 |                     summary=f"LLM call failed: {exc}",
 318 |                     steps_taken=step,
 319 |                     total_tokens=total_tokens,
 320 |                     error=str(exc),
 321 |                     cache_stats=cumulative_cache,
 322 |                 )
 323 | 
 324 |             billable_tokens = response.total_tokens
 325 |             if response.cache_stats and response.cache_stats.has_cache_activity:
 326 |                 cumulative_cache.cache_read_tokens += response.cache_stats.cache_read_tokens
 327 |                 cumulative_cache.cache_creation_tokens += response.cache_stats.cache_creation_tokens
 328 |                 cumulative_cache.non_cached_input_tokens += response.cache_stats.non_cached_input_tokens
 329 |                 # Cached prompt tokens still appear in provider usage, but they should not
 330 |                 # trip this run's hard exploration budget on repeated short tasks.
 331 |                 billable_tokens = max(0, billable_tokens - response.cache_stats.cache_read_tokens)
 332 |             total_tokens += billable_tokens
 333 | 
 334 |             # ── Token budget 硬上限 ────────────────────────────────────
 335 |             if total_tokens > self._cfg.budget_tokens:
 336 |                 ctx_breakdown = ""
 337 |                 last_stats = getattr(self, "_last_context_stats", None)
 338 |                 if last_stats:
 339 |                     ctx_breakdown = f" Context breakdown: {last_stats.summary_line()}"
 340 |                 reason = (
 341 |                     f"Token budget exceeded: {total_tokens} > {self._cfg.budget_tokens}. "
 342 |                     f"Stopping to prevent unbounded cost.{ctx_breakdown}"
 343 |                 )
 344 |                 logger.warning(reason)
 345 |                 log.log_task_failed(steps=step, reason=reason)
 346 |                 return RunResult(
 347 |                     task_id=task.task_id, status=RunStatus.GAVE_UP,
 348 |                     summary=reason, steps_taken=step,
 349 |                     total_tokens=total_tokens,
 350 |                     cache_stats=cumulative_cache,
 351 |                 )
 352 | 
 353 |             action = response.action
 354 | 
 355 |             # ── 2. 写入 Action event ────────────────────────────────────
 356 |             log.log_action(step=step, action=action, raw_content=response.raw_content)
 357 |             logger.info("Step %d: %r", step, action)
 358 | 
 359 |             # ── 3. 检测死循环（连续相同 action）────────────────────────
 360 |             if self._is_looping(log):
 361 |                 if not getattr(self, "_loop_break_injected", False):
 362 |                     # 第一次检测到循环：注入反射消息，让 LLM 停止重复
 363 |                     self._loop_break_injected = True
 364 |                     logger.warning("Loop detected — injecting break reflection")
 365 |                     history.add(LLMMessage(
 366 |                         role="user",
 367 |                         content=(
 368 |                             "[SYSTEM] You are repeating the same action. STOP repeating. "
 369 |                             "You already have the information you need. "
 370 |                             "Produce your final answer NOW using the finish action.\n\n"
 371 |                             f"[TASK ANCHOR] Your current task is: {task.description}"
 372 |                         ),
 373 |                     ))
 374 |                     continue
 375 |                 reason = f"Loop detected: same action repeated {self._cfg.loop_detection_window} times"
 376 |                 logger.warning(reason)
 377 |                 log.log_task_failed(steps=step, reason=reason)
 378 |                 return RunResult(
 379 |                     task_id=task.task_id,
 380 |                     status=RunStatus.GAVE_UP,
 381 |                     summary=reason,
 382 |                     steps_taken=step,
 383 |                     total_tokens=total_tokens,
 384 |                     cache_stats=cumulative_cache,
 385 |                 )
 386 | 
 387 |             # ── 4. 终止 action ──────────────────────────────────────────
 388 |             if action.action_type == ActionType.FINISH:
 389 |                 summary = action.message or "Task complete."
 390 |                 patch = self._get_git_diff(task.repo_path)
 391 |                 verdict = CompletionValidator().validate(log, policy, task.repo_path)
 392 |                 if not verdict.success:
 393 |                     log.log_task_failed(steps=step, reason=verdict.reason)
 394 |                     return RunResult(
 395 |                         task_id=task.task_id,
 396 |                         status=RunStatus.GAVE_UP,
 397 |                         summary=verdict.reason,
 398 |                         steps_taken=step,
 399 |                         total_tokens=total_tokens,
 400 |                         patch=patch,
 401 |                         cache_stats=cumulative_cache,
 402 |                     )
 403 |                 log.log_task_complete(steps=step, summary=summary)
 404 |                 self._extract_success_memories(task, log, summary)
 405 |                 return RunResult(
 406 |                     task_id=task.task_id,
 407 |                     status=RunStatus.SUCCESS,
 408 |                     summary=summary,
 409 |                     steps_taken=step,
 410 |                     total_tokens=total_tokens,
 411 |                     patch=patch,
 412 |                     cache_stats=cumulative_cache,
 413 |                 )
 414 | 
 415 |             if action.action_type == ActionType.GIVE_UP:
 416 |                 reason = action.message or "Agent gave up."
 417 |                 log.log_task_failed(steps=step, reason=reason)
 418 |                 return RunResult(
 419 |                     task_id=task.task_id,
 420 |                     status=RunStatus.GAVE_UP,
 421 |                     summary=reason,
 422 |                     steps_taken=step,
 423 |                     total_tokens=total_tokens,
 424 |                     cache_stats=cumulative_cache,
 425 |                 )
 426 | 
 427 |             # ── 5. 执行工具（支持并行 tool_calls）───────────────────────
 428 |             if action.action_type == ActionType.TOOL_CALL and action.tool_calls:
 429 |                 observations: list[Observation] = []
 430 |                 any_test_failed = False
 431 |                 missing_test_target_observation: Observation | None = None
 432 |                 any_edit = False
 433 | 
 434 |                 for tc in action.tool_calls:
 435 |                     gated_observation = self._verification_read_gate_observation(tc, task.repo_path)
 436 |                     if gated_observation is not None:
 437 |                         observation = gated_observation
 438 |                     else:
 439 |                         duplicate_observation = self._duplicate_file_read_observation(tc, task.repo_path)
 440 |                         if duplicate_observation is not None:
 441 |                             observation = duplicate_observation
 442 |                         else:
 443 |                             result = self._registry.execute_tool(tc.name, tc.params, thought=action.thought or "")
 444 |                             observation = result.to_observation(tc.name)
 445 |                     observations.append(observation)
 446 | 
 447 |                     if observation.is_success() and gated_observation is None:
 448 |                         transition = self._update_analysis_phase(tc, task.repo_path)
 449 |                         evidence_phase = None
 450 |                         if transition is not None:
 451 |                             previous_phase, current_phase, reason = transition
 452 |                             if reason == "inspect_read_limit":
 453 |                                 evidence_phase = previous_phase
 454 |                             state = self._analysis_phase_state
 455 |                             log.log_analysis_phase(
 456 |                                 step=step,
 457 |                                 previous_phase=previous_phase,
 458 |                                 current_phase=current_phase,
 459 |                                 reason=reason,
 460 |                                 files_read=len(state.files_read),
 461 |                                 inspect_reads=state.inspect_reads,
 462 |                                 verify_reads=state.verify_reads,
 463 |                             )
 464 |                         evidence_record = self._record_evidence(tc, observation, task.repo_path, phase=evidence_phase)
 465 |                         if evidence_record is not None:
 466 |                             log.log_evidence_record(step=step, record=evidence_record)
 467 | 
 468 |                     # 追踪文件读取路径（用于 procedural 记忆触发）
 469 |                     if tc.name in ("file_read", "file_view") and observation.is_success() and gated_observation is None:
 470 |                         file_path = tc.params.get("path") or tc.params.get("file_path") or ""
 471 |                         if file_path:
 472 |                             from agent.policy import normalize_repo_path
 473 |                             self._accessed_files.add(
 474 |                                 normalize_repo_path(file_path, task.repo_path)
 475 |                             )
 476 | 
 477 |                     # 追踪是否有文件写操作 + 标记 stale
 478 |                     if tc.name in ("file_write", "file_edit", "edit"):
 479 |                         any_edit = True
 480 |                         if observation.is_success():
 481 |                             written_path = tc.params.get("path") or tc.params.get("file_path") or ""
 482 |                             if written_path:
 483 |                                 from agent.policy import normalize_repo_path
 484 |                                 self._mark_stale_for_written_file(
 485 |                                     normalize_repo_path(written_path, task.repo_path)
 486 |                                 )
 487 | 
 488 |                     # 追踪测试是否失败
 489 |                     if tc.name in self._cfg.test_tool_names and not observation.is_success():
 490 |                         any_test_failed = True
 491 |                         if self._is_missing_test_target_observation(observation):
 492 |                             missing_test_target_observation = observation
 493 | 
 494 |                     log.log_observation(step=step, observation=observation)
 495 | 
 496 |                     if missing_test_target_observation is not None:
 497 |                         missing_test_target_message = self._format_missing_test_target_summary(
 498 |                             missing_test_target_observation
 499 |                         )
 500 |                         logger.info("Stopping immediately after missing pytest target")
... (1414 more lines not shown) Use file_view with start_line to read the rest.
summary:
File: agent\core.py (1914 lines total)
   1 | """
   2 | agent/core.py
   3 | 
   4 | ReAct 主循环。整个 agent 的大脑。
   5 | 
   6 | 职责（只做这些，不做别的）：
   7 | - 维护对话历史，每轮组装 messages 调用 LLM
   8 | - 拿到 Action 后调用 ToolRegistry 执行
   9 | - 把 Action + Observation 写入 EventLog
  10 | - 检测三种终止/Reflection 触发条件
  11 | - 返回 RunResult
  12 |
